Fun stuff. Today shall be long and unpleasant, working quite late. Send all the uplifting things, same name on discord.

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
up and at them
i try to avoid shows that have openers unless they are also a favorite
fun movie
dang
don't fuck with business cat
i knew it
yes
eating a bagel would be too crazy for me
he's a serial kiler
already knew both facts. any more brain busters?
we all know what it's for
as is tradition
but really friends, don't try to get your pet high
the shirt is about 100x less offensive than the jeans
(it was me. i did it)
mmm hmm
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Kevin Smith Has Great Alan Rickman, Dogma & Harry Potter Story (Language NSFW)
item.description: "Kevin told Jason Mewes that he had to be on his A game while making Dogma cause he didn’t want to piss off Rickman so Mewes memorized the script; and he didn’t just memorize his part, he memorized the WHOLE THING." https://www.instagram.com/reel/DAns0wOvQ3y/

item.description: What the tech guy found...
item.dc:creator: ESChapin

item.title: Daphne or Velma?
item.description: We had this idea of a Scooby Doo Photoshoot inspired by the 80s horror slasher Camp aesthetic. This is my fourth time cosplaying Velma so I wanted to change her outfit a bit to fit it to the idea in my head. When talking about the photoshoot we came up with the idea to also make a short video project and because of this I also cosplayed Daphne for the first time :3 Here are some of the pictures we made that also ended up in the video hope you like them and tell me are you Team Daphne or Velma? All pictures made by Paul Burian (IG)
item.dc:creator: Justawaykitty

item.title: Eclectic mix of weird shit.
item.description:
Dare to pass
Ka-boom
Scrooged
Musical!
Hail Science!
Not on a mechanical bull? Now I understand what I have been doing wrong.
The real van
Still... Born to sin
Y'know. For kids!
They really don't
They werent alway. That's why genXers have abandonment issues.
Batman!!!
Sad horse
Watermellon life
Always start with a basic staple.
Pull your weight
Speaking of weight
HR catching up with Kirk
Evacuate
Ewwwwww
Ooookay
Fight!
Great guy
Morons
It is vigo
Slave Leia
Again
Saluting!
Yeah, I'm an Engineer.
My phone background
AaaaahCheeeeeew
Wish I had a burger
Accurate
Nightmare
Must sign in blood
Yes indeed
Pupper gonna die of fright
Use tongue
Doin' great
My wife's tummy after having her gallbladder removed. They couldn't find it.
More nightmare fuel
A little knowledge
Careful what you say.
More knowledge!
Even more knowledge
What I'd do to become Batman
I see the resemblance
Knots!
Too bad there's nothing beyond. Or is there.

item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: I sewed this! All 384 handmade flowers, hand embroidery, and both the under- and over-dresses!
item.description:
The final dress is almost an art piece to me. It took so long to create, having worked on it off and on for 6 months, losing track of the hours I poured into it. The underdress is cotton voile, fully lined in the same fabric. The overdress is polyester voile (as are all the flowers). I used chain stitch for the vines. All the flowers have beads at the center, are 6 petals each, and were sewn on individually.
You can see the two gold trimmed hems of the underdress somewhat here.
Close up of the flowers! So. Much. Time!
item.dc:creator: jenniesuesews
